product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello, I'm very interested in your Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro). I was wondering if there might be any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro)! I can offer you a special price of $2,200 for this high-performance laptop.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but $2,200 is a bit outside my current budget for this. I could offer $1,750 for it.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget considerations. How about meeting in the middle at $1,900 for the MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro)?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you trying to meet me in the middle, but $1,900 is still more than I can afford right now. I have to pass on that.
